changes: Inner Chaos: Potency has been increased from 660 to 700.
Primal Rend: Potency has been increased from 700 to 720.
Primal Ruination: Potency has been increased from 780 to 800.
Midare Setsugekka: Potency increase from the trait Way of the Samurai III has been changed from 640 to 680.
Kaeshi: Setsugekka: Potency increase from the trait Way of the Samurai III has been changed from 640 to 680.
Gluttony: Potency has been increased from 520 to 560.
Void Reaping: Potency increase from the trait Melee Mastery III has been changed from 560 to 580.
Enhanced Void Reaping: Potency increase from the trait Melee Mastery III has been changed from 620 to 640.
Cross Reaping: Potency increase from the trait Melee Mastery III has been changed from 560 to 580.
Enhanced Cross Reaping: Potency increase from the trait Melee Mastery III has been changed from 620 to 640.
Vicewinder: Potency has been increased from 500 to 540.
Hunter's Coil: Potency has been increased from 570 to 630.
Hunter's Coil (Flank): Potency has been increased from 620 to 680.
Swiftskin's Coil: Potency has been increased from 570 to 630.
Swiftskin's Coil (Rear): Potency has been increased from 620 to 680.
Reawaken: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
First Generation: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Second Generation: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Third Generation: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Fourth Generation: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Ouroboros: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
First Legacy: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Second Legacy: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Third Legacy: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Fourth Legacy: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Painflare: Potency has been increased from 150 to 220.
Ruby Rite: Potency upon learning the trait Arcane Mastery has been changed from 580 to 620.
Crimson Cyclone: Potency upon learning the trait Arcane Mastery has been changed from 520 to 560.
Crimson Strike: Potency upon learning the trait Arcane Mastery has been changed from 520 to 560.
Necrotize: Potency has been increased from 460 to 500.
Phlegma III: Potency has been increased from 600 to 690.
Eukrasian Dosis III: Potency upon learning the trait Magick Mastery has been changed from 85 to 90.
Psyche: Potency has been increased from 600 to 690.
Recuperate: Cure potency increased from 15,000 to 16,000.
Guard: Damage reduction increased from 90% to 99%.
Bloodbath: Damage dealt increase changed from 10% to 25%.
Smite: Now ignores the effects of Guard when dealing damage.
Haelan: Cast time made instant.
Haelan: Cure potency increased from 15,000 to 16,000.
Haelan: Potency reduced to 8,000 when targeting self.
Chaotic Spring: HP absorption increased from 150% to 200%.
Horrid Roar: Recast time reduced from 24 to 20 seconds.
Meisui: Regen potency increased from 4,000 to 5,000.
Ogi Namikiri: Barrier potency when attacking two or more targets reduced from 10,000 to 8,000.
Meikyo Shisui: HP recovery increase from healing actions reduced from 20% to 15%.
Kaeshi: Namikiri: Barrier potency when attacking two or more targets reduced from 10,000 to 8,000.
Tendo Setsugekka: Cure potency reduced from 10,000 to 8,000.
Tendo Kaeshi Setsugekka: Cure potency reduced from 10,000 to 8,000.
Bloodcoil: Potency increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Slither: Movement speed increased from 25% to 50%.
Sanguine Feast: Potency increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
World-swallower: Added effect 'Absorbs 50% of damage dealt as HP'.
Curing Waltz: Cure potency reduced from 12,000 to 10,000.
Xenoglossy: Charge time reduced from 16 to 15 seconds.
Flare: Potency increased from 13,500 to 15,000.
Freeze: Potency increased from 9,000 to 10,000.
Soul Resonance: Elemental Star effect duration increased from 30 to 60 seconds.
Mountain Buster: Added effect 'Reduces damage taken by 15%' for 5 seconds.
Corps-a-corps: Monomachy damage dealt increase to target increased from 10% to 15%.
Corps-a-corps: Monomachy damage taken reduction from target increased from 10% to 15%.
Forte: Effect duration increased from 4 to 5 seconds.
Smudge: Movement speed increase duration reduced from 4 to 3 seconds.
Retribution of the Madeen: Potency reduced from 16,000 to 14,000.
Cure III: Potency is no longer reduced after the first target.
Pneuma: Recast time reduced from 30 to 28 seconds.

new_content.name: The Clyteum
new_content.description: A new dungeon that can be entered with Trust or Duty Support NPCs or with explorer mode enabled.

new_content.name: The Unmaking
new_content.description: A new trial for eight players.

new_content.name: The Unmaking (Extreme)
new_content.description: Extreme version of the new trial accessible via Raid Finder.

new_content.name: Shinryu's Domain (Unreal)
new_content.description: An Unreal trial replacing Tsukuyomi's Pain (Unreal).

new_content.name: Windurst: The Third Walk
new_content.description: A new alliance raid dungeon for 24 players.

new_content.name: The Hollow Promise
new_content.description: New Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Consolidation of Dyes
new_content.description: Dyes have been consolidated into three categories: Standard Spectrum, Wide Spectrum #1, and Wide Spectrum #2.

new_content.name: Configuration Sharing
new_content.description: A system to upload and download hotbar and configuration settings via Share Codes.

new_content.name: Group Pose Updates
new_content.description: Includes Portrait Mode, Soft Focus, and Eye Settings adjustments.

new_content.name: Armoire Updates
new_content.description: Expanded storage for class/job-specific gear and dungeon gear from Patch 7.0 onward.

housing.name: Charcoal Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall that can be left bare or laden with decorations, depending on one's mood.

housing.name: Dark Wood Flooring
housing.description: This dark wood lends an intimate air to any room while also making inevitable blemishes on the floor less apparent.

housing.name: Square Ceiling Lamp
housing.description: This unobtrusive lighting fixture brightens a room without drawing the eye upward.

housing.name: Garden Mood Lighting
housing.description: Perfect for setting a festive mood far past the point when everyone should have gone home.

housing.name: Semicircular Outdoor Stage
housing.description: For thespians whose brilliance cannot be bound by the stifling walls of a theater.

housing.name: Lattice Window Seat
housing.description: The large window behind this seat provides a luxurious view of the world without.

housing.name: Minimalist Poplar Partition
housing.description: A simple partition which is perfectly functional without any adornments at all.

housing.name: Minimalist Poplar Partition Door
housing.description: A partition equipped with the minimum number of doors required to allow passage.

housing.name: Everkeep Platform Bed
housing.description: These low beds are a common sight in the homes of Everkeep.

housing.name: Everkeep Sofa
housing.description: Despite its utilitarian look, this sofa is the perfect place for long hours of lounging.

housing.name: Curved Everkeep Sofa
housing.description: A curved sofa which allows for face-to-face conversations more easily than traditional shapes.

housing.name: Everkeep Partition
housing.description: A simple partition with slits that allow people on either side to peer at each other playfully.

housing.name: Everkeep Dining Table
housing.description: A sleek dining table whose dark surface hides traces of any food-related mishaps.

housing.name: Everkeep Round Table
housing.description: A simple round table that can be found in dining rooms across Everkeep.

housing.name: Everkeep Sideboard
housing.description: A spacious sideboard favored by many an Everkeep resident for its stylish design.

housing.name: Everkeep Chest
housing.description: A chest popular in Everkeep for its relatively compact size and generous storage.

housing.name: Everkeep Kitchen Counter
housing.description: A wide kitchen counter equipped with enough drawers to accommodate culinarians of all persuasions.

housing.name: Everkeep Monitor
housing.description: Ubiquitous within Everkeep, these monitors are an essential part of day-to-day life in the city.

housing.name: Everkeep Stereo
housing.description: Debates abound as to whether the quality of the sound these devices emit justifies their cost.

housing.name: Rod of Nihility Display
housing.description: A pitch-dark display stand. The tenebrous aura of a powerful voidsent emanates from within.

housing.name: Everkeep Wall Decoration
housing.description: A decoration sometimes found in the homes of Everkeep's more discerning residents, who insist they understand its meaning.

housing.name: Everkeep Rug
housing.description: A large rug woven with a pattern that has become the talk of Everkeep.

glamour.name: Augmented Courtly Lover's Gear (Weapons, Armor, Accessories)
glamour.description: High-level glamour gear obtainable via exchange in Solution Nine.

glamour.name: Shadowhound Attire
glamour.description: A dark, themed attire set including Helm, Armor, Gauntlets, Cuisses, and Sabatons.

glamour.name: Black Shuck Attire
glamour.description: Themed equipment set including Helm, Armor, Gauntlets, Cuisses, and Sabatons.

glamour.name: Rule-breaker's Attire
glamour.description: Set including Visor, Vest, Gloves, Bottoms, and Boots.

glamour.name: Praemagitek/Vana'dielian Gear Sets
glamour.description: New gear sets for various roles (Fending, Maiming, Striking, Aiming, Scouting, Casting, Healing) including head, body, hands, legs, and feet pieces.

glamour.name: Hooded Tunics (Plain, Succubus, Festival variants)
glamour.description: Casual clothing items with multiple silhouette options (Oversized, Form-fitting).

glamour.name: Twill Trousers (Straight-cut, Bell-bottom, Baggy, Worn, Stonewashed)
glamour.description: Various styles of trousers for glamour use.
